title: Senior Doctor - Indraprastha Apollo Capital India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Indraprastha Apollo Capital India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Indraprastha Apollo Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Indraprastha Apollo Capital India:
Indraprastha Apollo Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
